$comment: Agentic QE Framework v2 — User-configurable settings. Agents read this file instead of using hardcoded values.

exploration.$comment: maxAttemptsPerStep: how many times Explorer retries a failing interaction before flagging in enriched.md

executor.$comment: maxCycles: how many fix-and-rerun cycles before stopping. preFlightEnabled: run tsc + fidelity check

timeouts.$comment: testTimeoutMs: per-test timeout (increase for long E2E scenarios). Override these for slower enterprise apps. Values in milliseconds.

enrichedScenario.$comment: filenameSuffix: appended to scenario name for enriched version. createOnExploration: Explorer writes enriched file. neverModifyExisting: once created, Explorer never edits.

bugDetection.$comment: Controls bug detection sensitivity. uncertainVerdictEnabled: allow UNCERTAIN verdict for ambiguous cases.

builder.$comment: incrementalUpdate: when true, Builder runs scenario-diff.js and only updates changed steps. preserveHealedCode: never overwrite code with // HEALED comments. preservePacingComments: never remove // PACING: waits.

chunking.$comment: maxStepsPerChunk: maximum steps per Explorer chunk (if Explorer verification is chunked for long scenarios). alwaysChunk: false for Copilot (subagents share 200K context window — chunking adds risk with no benefit). Set true only for Claude Code CLI where subagents get independent context windows.

appContext.$comment: filename: the app-context file name in scenarios/app-contexts/. ALL agents MUST use this exact filename — do NOT guess from URL, domain, or app name. Change this value when onboarding a different application.

observability.$comment: All agents MUST populate observability fields in their metrics JSON. metricsVersion tracks schema changes. If platform does not expose token counts, agents write 'Platform does not expose token count' instead of omitting the field.
